name: The Lively Dragon
dialogue: So. You made it past the sign.
Most trainers see the level range and walk back to the village. The smart ones, anyway.
I'm Lively Dragon. I named this patch. I rule it.
Six of mine. All above seventy-five. None of yours have seen anything like them.
Last chance to turn around. ... Suit yourself.
preBattleLine: Lively Dragon doesn't pose. She just lets her party out and the storm rolls in.
postDefeatDialogue: Take the patch. Take the XP. Take the bragging rights.
I'll be back when you're not looking. Sleep on that.
